seoTitle: Kent Town vs Kepa — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kent Town and Kepa. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kent Town vs Kepa: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kent Town and Kepa.
heading: Kent Town vs Kepa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kent Town, South Australia and Kepa, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kent Town has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kepa (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kent Town or Kepa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kent Town has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Kepa scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kent Town scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Kepa scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kent Town or Kepa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kent Town has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
